Alberta Sour.method: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a rocks glass over ice.

Altos Margarita.method: Shake with ice, strain into a salt-rimmed glass over ice.

Americano.method: Build over ice in a rocks glass, top with soda water, garnish with orange.

Anejo Old Fashioned.method: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube, garnish with orange twist.

Aperol Sour.method: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a coupe glass.

ingredients: 4 oz apple juice or sparkling apple cider

ingredients: Lemon twist or olive to garnish

Beer Shandy.method: Pour beer into a chilled glass, gently top with lemonade.

ingredients: Lemon twist or olive to garnish
